title: ProvenancedValue
description: Canonical per-field provenance shape (EFDB + ls-ingestion convention). Reuse for every extracted or derived datum. Empty source_snippet ⇒ confidence must be 'low'. Overall artifact confidence = min of per-field confidence.

source_snippet.description: Verbatim evidence: document span, cell ref, or prior-artifact id.

extraction_note.description: Why null / why anomalous / assumption made.
